metadata.title: Alpina — Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics
metadata.description: The official app that turns your Olympic experience into unforgettable moments. Download Alpina for the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Games.

hero.title: Olympics 2026
hero.tagline: Experience the Games like never before!
hero.description1: The official app for the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics.
hero.description2: Live results, personalized alerts, and exclusive content so you never miss a moment.
hero.qrCodeLabel: QR code to download the app

experienceIntro.description: Scan QR codes at venues and unlock exclusive mascots for each Olympic discipline.

features.title: A complete experience
features.subtitle: Discover all the features that make this app your essential companion for the Olympic Games

items.title: Seamless experience
items.description: Easily navigate between events, results, and real-time news with an intuitive interface.

items.title: Unique digital memories
items.description: Capture and keep your favorite Olympic moments with photos, videos, and exclusive content.

items.title: Full personalization
items.description: Follow your favorite sports and athletes, and receive personalized notifications based on your preferences.

items.title: Physical keepsakes
items.description: Order personalized merchandise and create photo albums of your best moments.

items.title: Real-time updates
items.description: Stay informed with instant notifications about results, medals, and highlights.

items.title: Emotional immersion
items.description: Dive into the Olympic atmosphere with immersive content, exclusive interviews, and behind-the-scenes access.

download.title: Download the app now
download.description: Available free on iOS and Android. Join millions of Olympic fans around the world.

gallery.title: The spirit of the Winter Olympics
gallery.subtitle: Discover the intensity and beauty of winter sports through the official app

Harrop and Anselmet deliver mixed relay gold for France – Milano Cortina 2026
